verdict.label: Worth checking
verdict.headline: Rey Cortiço Early morning — 08:00
verdict.reason: Rey Cortiço is worth a quick check for early morning — 08:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide should let the sandbars work without overdoing it.

best.windFit: N 15 km/h · cross-onshore · poor wind fit

photo.alt: Photo of Rey Cortiço surf spot

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Rey Cortiço looks like a small north coast window for Rare window, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 45 kJ, 9 s period, lully 22/100, and wind is the main risk.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small; 6-9s at low tide can still work on Belgas if the sandbars are lined up, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; wind angle is poor for this spot.
best.shortExplanation: Rey Cortiço is worth a quick check for early morning — 08:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide should let the sandbars work without overdoing it.
warnings: wind angle is poor for this spot

ranked.explanation: Supertubos looks like a clean small window for Worth checking, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 29 kJ, 8 s period, lully 9/100, and good wind at 20 km/h.  A fast, hollow sand-bottom wave that gets serious quickly; this is best for short, punchy bodyboard barrels when it is small enough for comfort; 6-9s at low tide is too dry and dumping for Supertubos / Molhe Leste.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; 6-9s at low tide is too dry and dumping for Supertubos / Molhe Leste.
ranked.shortExplanation: Supertubos is worth a quick check for early morning — 08:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  The wind should help keep it tidy.  The tide is leaning more serious than easy here.
warnings: 6-9s at low tide is too dry and dumping for Supertubos / Molhe Leste

ranked.explanation: Molhe Leste looks like a clean small window for Too soft, Low confidence: 0-0.3 m, 29 kJ, 8 s period, lully 16/100, and good wind at 20 km/h.  A jetty-shaped beach break with punchy rights and lefts; this is best for sheltered power when Supertubos has too much size.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; 6-9s at mid tide stays weak and soft for Supertubos / Molhe Leste; Molhe Leste looks below your bodyboard fun size.
ranked.shortExplanation: Molhe Leste is worth a quick check for mid-morning — 11:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  It looks too soft to make the drive worthwhile.  The wind should help keep it tidy.  The tide is helping, but the spot still looks serious.
warnings: 6-9s at mid tide stays weak and soft for Supertubos / Molhe Leste

photo.alt: Photo of Cantinho da Baia surf spot

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

ranked.explanation: Cantinho da Baia looks like a small window for Too soft, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 70 kJ, 9 s period, consistent 77/100, and wind is the main risk.  A forgiving sandy bay with lots of take-off points; this is best for easy wave count and cleaner faces when the north wind is bothering exposed beaches; 6-9s at low tide is basically flat or too weak in the sheltered bay.  Watch: spot surf looks too small; wind angle is poor for this spot; 6-9s at low tide is basically flat or too weak in the sheltered bay; Cantinho da Baia looks below your bodyboard fun size; Cantinho da Baia may feel too soft without more push.
ranked.shortExplanation: Cantinho da Baia is worth a quick check for early morning — 08:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  It looks too soft to make the drive worthwhile.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide is a bit awkward for the bay, so stay cautious.
warnings: wind angle is poor for this spot
6-9s at low tide is basically flat or too weak in the sheltered bay
